problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: The key to What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? is Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) — specifically Biomimetic surface structure — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
